form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 3 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Bulli, recording a speedy 22.46 over the 400m journey. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 401m (23.04) beating Fugenzo in Grade 5 on March 29. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 388m at Gosford. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Form has tapered off a little since recording maiden win three back at Wentworth Park. Placed two back then finished a 12 length fourth (30.55) at Wentworth Park. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 1.5 lengths at this track (22.88) beating Ritza Kris in a Grade 5 on March 20. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on February 25 over 320m at this track behind Suddenly I See beaten 8 lengths (19.07) in a Maiden. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
